header.description: Use the Google Cloud Storage API

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

ifMetagenerationMatch.description: Only return data if the metageneration value of the Bucket matches the sent value

ifMetagenerationNotMatch.description: Only return data if the metageneration value of the Bucket does not match the sent value

predefinedAcl.placeholder: Apply a predefined set of access controls to this bucket

predefinedDefaultObjectAcl.placeholder: Apply a predefined set of default object access controls to this bucket

cors.placeholder: The bucket's Cross Origin Resource Sharing configuration

customPlacementConfig.placeholder: The configuration for the region(s) for the Bucket

dataLocations.placeholder: The list of individual regions that comprise a dual-region Bucket

defaultEventBasedHold.placeholder: Whether or not to automatically apply an event based hold to new objects

defaultObjectAcl.placeholder: Default Access Controls for new objects when no ACL is provided

labels.placeholder: User provided bucket labels, in key/value pairs

rpo.placeholder: The recovery point objective for the bucket

storageClass.placeholder: The bucket's default storage class for objects that don't define one

website.placeholder: The bucket's website configuration for when it is used to host a website

alt.placeholder: The type of data to return from the request

createFromBinary.description: Whether the data for creating a file should come from a binary field

createContent.description: Content of the file to be uploaded

maxResults.description: Max number of results to return

generation.placeholder: Select a specific revision of the chosen object

ifGenerationMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object generation matching this value

ifGenerationNotMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object generation not matching this value

ifMetagenerationMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object's current metageneration matching this value

ifMetagenerationNotMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object's current metageneration not matching this value

predefinedAcl.placeholder: Apply a predefined set of Access Controls to the object

generation.placeholder: Select a specific revision of the chosen object

ifGenerationMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object generation matching this value

ifGenerationNotMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object generation not matching this value

ifMetagenerationMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object's current metageneration matching this value

ifMetagenerationNotMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object's current metageneration not matching this value

generation.placeholder: Select a specific revision of the chosen object

ifGenerationMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object generation matching this value

ifGenerationNotMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object generation not matching this value

ifMetagenerationMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object's current metageneration matching this value

ifMetagenerationNotMatch.placeholder: Make operation conditional of the object's current metageneration not matching this value

predefinedAcl.placeholder: Apply a predefined set of Access Controls to the object

X-Goog-Encryption-Algorithm.placeholder: The encryption algorithm to use, which must be AES256. Use to supply your own key in the request

X-Goog-Encryption-Key.placeholder: Base64 encoded string of your AES256 encryption key

X-Goog-Encryption-Key-Sha256.placeholder: Base64 encoded string of the SHA256 hash of your encryption key

delimiter.placeholder: Returns results in directory-like mode, using this value as the delimiter

endOffset.placeholder: Filter results to names lexicographically before this value

includeTrailingDelimiter.placeholder: If true, objects will appear with exactly one instance of delimiter at the end of the name

prefix.placeholder: Filter results to names that start with this value

startOffset.placeholder: Filter results to names lexicographically equal or after this value

versions.placeholder: If true, list all versions of objects as distinct entries

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Whether to accept the response even if SSL certificate validation is not possible

proxy.description: HTTP proxy to use. If authentication is required it can be defined as follow: http://username:password@myproxy:3128

timeout.description: Time in ms to wait for the server to send response headers (and start the response body) before aborting the request
